title: Classroom to crime scene: Hands-On learning in UNI’s new Crime Scene House
summary_en: UNI criminology students are gaining hands-on investigative experience in the Crime Scene House, a realistic training space where staged evidence-based scenarios help bring classroom concepts to life.
title_cn: 从课堂到犯罪现场：北爱荷华大学新建犯罪现场实训屋开展实操教学

title: This UNI grad found a path at a major accounting firm immediately after graduation
summary_en: Alexis Munsell loves living the life of an accountant. It was a dream she realized at the University of Northern Iowa.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学一名毕业生毕业即入职大型会计师事务所

title: UNI students win funding at the 26th Annual John Pappajohn Student Entrepreneurial Venture Competition
summary_en: Three UNI students won funding for their businesses at the 2026 John Pappajohn Student Entrepreneurial Venture Competition on April 10. Kadin Walter was one of three winners of this year’s competition, receiving $5,000 for his venture Work N Walter Farms.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学学生在第26届约翰·帕帕约翰年度学生创业竞赛中获得资助

title: UNI Gallery of Art celebrates BFA Thesis Exhibition and Women’s & Gender Studies milestone
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa Gallery of Art will present the Spring 2026 Bachelor of Fine Arts (BFA) Group Thesis Exhibition from Friday, May 1 through Friday, May 15.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学美术馆庆祝美术学士毕业作品展开展暨妇女与性别研究取得里程碑进展

title: UNI earns graduate education honors, student competes in Three Minute Thesis competition at regional conference
summary_en: UNI received Honorable Mention for the Excellence and Innovation in Graduate Education Award at the 82nd Midwestern Association of Graduate Schools (MAGS) Annual Conference. MAGS represents more than 100 institutions across 14 states, making this recognition a tremendous honor for our graduate programs and the students, faculty and staff who make them exceptional.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学荣获研究生教育类荣誉 该校学生参与地区性学术会议三分钟论文竞赛
